title: Codex phase review result
description: Final response shape for the independent Codex phase review. APPROVED is valid only when no actionable P0, P1 or P2 findings remain.

decision.description: APPROVED only when no actionable P0, P1 or P2 findings exist and the phase is safe to present for human review.

summary.description: Concise overall assessment of the phase: what was reviewed, how thoroughly, and the basis for the decision.

findings.description: All findings, most severe first. Empty array when there are none.

file.description: Repository-relative path of the affected file.

line.description: 1-indexed line the finding anchors to, or null when it applies to the whole file or to a missing file.

failure_scenario.description: Concrete inputs or state under which the defect produces wrong behaviour.

explanation.description: Why this is wrong and why it matters.

suggested_fix.description: Practical recommended correction. Described only — the reviewer never applies fixes.
